question_text: Which statement best describes how particles are arranged in a solid?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles are loosely packed and move freely throughout the solid

options.label: B
options.text: Particles are tightly packed in a fixed arrangement and vibrate in fixed positions

options.label: C
options.text: Particles are arranged in layers that can slide over each other

options.label: D
options.text: Particles have no fixed arrangement and move randomly

explanation: In solids, particles are held tightly together by strong forces in a regular, fixed pattern. Although they vibrate in place, they cannot move freely like particles in liquids or gases.
